r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Mid-to-high handicap golfers over 45 have invested a fortune in equipment, lessons, and tutorials but never truly transform their game. Traditional golf instruction doesn't work because coaches teach THEIR swing — not a swing customized for YOUR body, age, limitations, or habits. Improvements are always temporary: excitement for a few weeks, then back to old habits on the course.
emotional_amplifiers: getting better at golf is hard... Anyone who says it's not? They're lying.
I'm just not good enough. Maybe it's too late for me to take my game to the next level.
I'll never be the golfer I always dreamed of being.
this frustrating cycle eats at you
relatability_triggers: if you're like most serious players, you've probably spent a small fortune on equipment and lessons
But are you any closer to being the golfer you've always wanted to be?
most golf instructors simply don't have the high-level experience to be able to teach all levels of the game. That's why they teach you THEIR swing.
fixes work great in the moment... but when you step onto the golf course, you fall right back into your old habits

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: The Tiger Experience: A 48-hour in-person transformation at Hank Haney's Chicago studio combining the exact immersive coaching method Hank used with Tiger Woods for 6 years, cutting-edge swing technology (slow motion cameras, tracking technology), the Immersion Method, one-on-one personalized coaching, tour-level ball flight training, mindset techniques from Tiger, secretive game plan cheatsheets, and 12 months of unlimited video coaching. The method identifies the ONE hidden root swing flaw using tens of thousands of dollars of tracking technology, creates a custom cure based on YOUR body type, age, and limitations, then installs it into your DNA through total immersion.
mechanism_proof_points: Hank Haney coached Tiger Woods exclusively for 6 years (31 PGA Tour wins, 6 majors during their run)
Tiger won 40% of tournaments during Haney's tenure
49 years of coaching experience, 157,000+ golfers transformed
Coached Mark O'Meara and select group of celebrities and private students
Invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to create advanced facility in Chicago
Johnny Golf: gained 30 yards, dropped 5 shots, fixed short game in 2 days
Russel Meyer: brutal slice now getting compliments on drives
Terry Butler: ready to quit, reignited game, real results
Dennis Moreland: improved 8-9 shots, saved 10 years of trying
Rusty Weekes: put on a clinic, slight draw, 25-30 yards more distance
unique_differentiators: World's first: Experience EXACTLY what Tiger Woods went through during Hank's 6-year exclusive coaching relationship
One-on-one personalized coaching with Hank Haney personally (not group, not assistant)
Same customized coaching given to Tiger, Mark O'Meara, and private clients
100% custom cure based on YOUR body type, age, injuries, and limitations
Identifies the ONE hidden root swing flaw causing virtually every problem
Designed so you never need another traditional lesson, video tutorial, or training aid again
Includes tour-level ball flight training (high draws, bullet fades on command)
Tiger's personal mindset techniques for pressure situations
Secretive game plan cheatsheets developed with Tiger over 6 years

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Slow motion cameras and tens of thousands of dollars of tracking technology track every millisecond of movement in every joint, muscle, and ligament. Identifies the exact flaw sabotaging every swing with pinpoint accuracy.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Only the creme de la creme of Pros have access. Most jealously-guarded technology in golf.

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Advanced teaching approach ('Immersion Method') so effective U.S. Navy SEALs use it. Combined with advanced 3D motion recording technology. Installs custom cure into DNA so every swing is accurate as a laser-guided missile.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Used by U.S. Navy SEALs. Same approach used with Tiger for 6 years.

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: After root flaw eliminated, trains golfer to hit high draws, bullet fades, and everything in between — on command. 99% of amateurs cannot do this.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Already worked for golfers in their 80s with same results as 40s.

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Play 9 holes on SIM together with Hank. Identify every real-time scenario where mistakes happen. Apply new swing. Learn Tiger's mindset: slow heart rate, visualize shots, calm nerves after bad shot.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Same mindset techniques used with Tiger — 'one he showed me'.

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Series of game plans for winning developed over years with Tiger. Covers how to play any course, best clubs, when to attack or play safe, pressure holes. Not yardage books — highly secretive game plans.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Developed with Tiger. Some leaked to top touring pros. Cannot be found anywhere else.

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Continued coaching with elite instructor on Hank's team. Send video of any problem, get exact solution. Ongoing access for 12 full months.
tactical_breakdown.proof: Same type of access touring pros have. First time recreational golfers get this level.

primary_transformation.statement: Drop 5 to 10 strokes off your handicap in just 48 hours using the exact same method Tiger Woods went through — and never need another traditional lesson or video tutorial again
primary_transformation.campaign_thesis: The reason you haven't improved despite investing a fortune in lessons and equipment is that traditional golf instruction teaches the instructor's swing — a generic approach never customized for YOUR body, age, limitations, or habits. The transformational coaching that creates the greatest players has always existed — it's the method Hank Haney refined over 6 years exclusively coaching Tiger Woods. Until now, it has never been available to recreational golfers. The Tiger Experience brings this exact method to you in a 48-hour immersive weekend.

promises: Drop 5 to 10 strokes off your handicap in 48 hours
Fix the ONE hidden flaw in your swing that's ruining your entire game
Leave with a swing built specifically for YOU — consistent, repeatable, nearly automatic
Never need another traditional lesson or video tutorial again
Skills that make you a better golfer than any other amateur you play with
Rock-solid confidence every time you take a shot
Zero anxiety stepping up to the ball
Blow the minds of everyone you play with
Slow heart rate on first tee in front of strangers
Visualize any shot clearly and execute when all eyes are on you
Calm nerves after bad shot and bounce back on very next shot
Unfair advantage over every amateur you play with via secretive cheatsheets
Know exactly how to play any course the instant you step on it
Best clubs to use, when to attack pin or play safe
Play pressure holes (long par-5s, tricky par-3s) with success
Hit high draws, bullet fades, everything in between — on command

you'll never need another traditional lesson or video tutorial again
shock your friends, leave your playing partners speechless
finally play at the level you always dreamed about

headline.main_headline: Hey there, I'm Hank Haney. If you're ready to transform your golf game and experience something you'll brag about for the rest of your life, stick around.
headline.subheadline: What I'm about to share is so mind-blowing, it might just change how you see golf forever.
headline.deck_copy: Because I've crafted the ultimate opportunity for you to experience exactly what Tiger Woods went through during the 6 years I worked with him exclusively.
power_words: exactly what Tiger Woods went through
headline.promise_compression: Experience exactly what Tiger Woods went through with his personal coach for 6 years, identify and permanently fix the ONE hidden flaw ruining your game, and drop 5-10 strokes in a single 48-hour weekend — customized for YOUR body, age, and limitations.

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Golf improvement comes from lessons, practice, video tutorials, and training aids — incremental improvement over months and years.
schema_analysis.new_schema: A single 48-hour weekend with Tiger Woods' actual coach, using the exact methods that created the greatest golfer in history, can permanently transform your game — identifying and eliminating the ONE root swing flaw so you never need another lesson again.
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Hank Haney IS the mechanism — 6 years exclusively coaching Tiger (31 PGA Tour wins, 6 majors), 49 years experience, 157,000+ golfers, advanced tracking technology, the Immersion Method, and Tiger's personal mindset techniques.

headline.vsl_adaptation: Hey there, I'm Hank Haney. If you're ready to transform your golf game and experience something you'll brag about for the rest of your life, stick around. What I'm about to share is so mind-blowing, it might just change how you see golf forever. Because I've crafted the ultimate opportunity for you to experience exactly what Tiger Woods went through during the 6 years I worked with him exclusively.

lead.full_text: Hey there, I'm Hank Haney. If you're ready to transform your golf game and experience something you'll brag about for the rest of your life, stick around. What I'm about to share is so mind-blowing, it might just change how you see golf forever. Because I've crafted the ultimate opportunity for you to experience exactly what Tiger Woods went through during the 6 years I worked with him exclusively. So weekend warriors like you can shock your friends, leave your playing partners speechless, and finally fix the one thing in your swing that's been holding you back — all in just 48 hours... No matter how old you are, what physical limitations you have, or how long you've struggled to improve. Let's be clear — this isn't your run-of-the-mill lesson. It's not some boring video tutorial. And it's definitely not a quick tip or a trendy gadget. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for a small handful of Performance Golf Members to rapidly become the player you've always wanted to be. But don't get too excited — this isn't for everyone. Only a select few will qualify for this groundbreaking opportunity.
lead.hook_sentence: Hey there, I'm Hank Haney. If you're ready to transform your golf game and experience something you'll brag about for the rest of your life, stick around.
lead.transition_to_body: Transitions from the celebrity authority hook and exclusivity framing through immediate testimonial proof (5 transformation stories with specific results), then into the problem section ('getting better at golf is hard') before revealing the full Tiger Experience opportunity.

primary_promise.statement: Drop 5 to 10 strokes off your handicap in a single 48-hour weekend using the exact same method that made Tiger Woods the greatest golfer in history — and never need another lesson again
primary_promise.campaign_thesis: Traditional golf instruction doesn't work because instructors teach their own swing, never customized for YOUR body, age, or limitations. The transformational coaching method that created the greatest golfers has been locked away with Hank Haney — exclusive to Tiger, Mark O'Meara, and private clients. For the first time, Hank is making this exact method available to recreational golfers over 45 at his Chicago studio.

supporting_promises.promise: Experience exactly what Tiger Woods went through during Hank's 6-year exclusive coaching run
Transform your game no matter how old you are, what physical limitations you have, or how long you've struggled
Hit high draws, bullet fades, and everything in between — on command
Rock-solid confidence replacing anxiety with Tiger's personal mindset techniques
Unfair advantage over every amateur via secretive game plan cheatsheets developed with Tiger
12 months unlimited coaching keeps transformation improving long after the weekend

promise_architecture.promise_ceiling: Drop 5-10 strokes in 48 hours; never need another lesson; become the best amateur at your club; works for golfers ages 45-83; hit any shot shape on command; Tiger's personal mindset techniques
promise_architecture.promise_floor: Significant game improvement in a 2-day weekend; new skills and confidence; personalized coaching
promise_architecture.failure_reframe: It's not your fault. Most golf coaches simply don't have the high-level experience to teach all levels of the game. That's why they teach you THEIR swing. Not a swing that fits YOUR body, YOUR age, YOUR limitations, or YOUR habits. That's why so many lessons feel great in the moment but when you step onto the golf course, you fall right back into your old habits.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Golfers believe they need more lessons, more practice, better equipment, or the latest tip to improve. They think golf improvement is a slow, incremental process requiring years of dedicated instruction.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Traditional instruction fails because most instructors don't have high-level experience to teach all levels of the game. They teach THEIR swing — not a swing customized for YOUR body, YOUR age, YOUR limitations, or YOUR habits. You have ONE hidden root swing flaw causing virtually every problem, and no generic lesson will identify or fix it. Only advanced tracking technology combined with the immersive coaching method Hank developed with Tiger can diagnose and permanently eliminate it.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Lessons and tutorials feel great in the moment, but when you step onto the golf course, you fall right back into your old habits and never truly become the skilled player you know you can be. The instruction was never customized for YOUR specific swing flaw. No one ever gave you a solution that's customized for YOU.

villain_profile.villain_motivation: Most golf coaches are good guys who WANT to help players. But they simply don't have the high-level experience to teach all levels of the game. They teach their own swing philosophy — a one-size-fits-all approach that's never customized. This system guarantees temporary improvement at best.
villain_profile.villain_evidence: Golfers invest a small fortune in equipment and lessons, spend hours watching tutorials, but are no closer to their goals. Improvement is temporary — feels great in the moment but back to old habits on the course. The transformational method that actually works has been locked away with elite coaches and tour pros.

key_metaphors: Teaching THEIR swing vs. YOUR swing — the fundamental mismatch
Total immersion — the kind of transformational coaching typically costing hundreds of thousands of dollars
Installed in your DNA — permanence of the transformation
Laser-guided missile — precision of the customized cure
What Tiger Woods went through — the celebrity aspirational frame
countersells: Traditional golf lessons fail because instructors lack high-level experience to teach all levels
Video tutorials don't work because the best methods can only be taught through total immersion
Training aids don't work because they address symptoms, not the ONE hidden root flaw
Generic instruction fails because it teaches the instructor's swing, not YOUR customized solution
Self-improvement fails because you don't have tracking technology to identify the actual root flaw

mechanism.name: The Tiger Experience (Total Immersion Coaching Method + Advanced Tracking Technology)
mechanism.explanation_text: The Tiger Experience is a 48-hour in-person transformation at Hank Haney's Chicago studio that replicates the exact coaching method Hank developed and refined over 6 years exclusively coaching Tiger Woods. The experience combines: (1) Root swing flaw diagnosis using slow motion cameras and tens of thousands of dollars of tracking technology — tracking every millisecond of movement in every joint, muscle, and ligament, identifying the exact flaw with pinpoint accuracy and generating a custom cure based on your body type, age, and limitations. (2) One-on-one Immersion Method installation — the same total immersion approach used with Tiger, where Hank works personally to install the custom cure into your DNA using advanced 3D motion recording technology. (3) Tour-level ball flight training — hitting high draws, bullet fades, and everything in between on command. (4) 9-hole SIM session with Hank — identifying and correcting real-time mistake scenarios plus Tiger's personal mindset techniques for pressure situations. (5) Secretive game plan cheatsheets — the series of winning blueprints developed over years with Tiger. (6) 12 months unlimited video coaching with an elite instructor on Hank's team.
credibility_anchors: Hank Haney coached Tiger Woods exclusively for 6 years (Tiger won 40% of tournaments during their run)
49 years of coaching experience transforming 157,000+ golfers
Coached Mark O'Meara and select celebrities and private students
Invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to create advanced Chicago facility
Immersion Method used by U.S. Navy SEALs
5 documented testimonials with specific results from pilot group
The kind of transformational coaching that typically costs hundreds of thousands of dollars
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: A world's first. Nobody has ever been in the position to share these top secret tactics, methods, and technology with recreational golfers before — because no one else on the planet has worked with Tiger Woods for 6 straight years during one of the most dominant stretches in the history of golf AND spent over 49 years transforming the games of over 157,000 golfers.

e5_mechanism_type.explanation: The Tiger Experience bundles Hank Haney's personal coaching methodology, advanced tracking technology, the Immersion Method, and Tiger's mindset techniques into a single branded 48-hour experience. The core competitive moat is Hank Haney HIMSELF — his 6 years with Tiger is an unreplicable credential. The underlying methods (motion capture, immersive learning, personalized coaching) are not new, but the combination with Hank personally + the Tiger Woods association creates an extremely proprietary feel. Pushes E4 through the branded experience and the extreme authority of Hank's Tiger connection.
e5_mechanism_type.market_sophistication_fit: Stage 4: Golf improvement market is highly sophisticated. Golfers have heard every tip, tried every lesson format. The Tiger Experience breaks through by offering an entirely different FORMAT (48-hour immersion with Tiger's actual coach) combined with extreme celebrity authority. The exclusivity (6 spots, 15,000 notified) and personal coaching with Hank himself elevate beyond commodity instruction.

mechanism.placement_density: The mechanism is teased in the lead (experience what Tiger went through), validated through testimonials, framed through the problem/solution architecture in mid-body, and detailed through the 6-step breakdown. Tiger's name appears 20+ times throughout. The Immersion Method is named and explained. The 6-step transformation structure serves as the central organizing framework.
key_analogies: Total immersion — the kind of coaching that typically costs hundreds of thousands of dollars
Laser-guided missile — precision of the customized cure
Installed in your DNA — permanence of the transformation
Not yardage books — highly secretive game plans
What Tiger Woods went through — the aspirational celebrity parallel
visual_elements: Slow motion cameras and tracking technology (described)
Testimonial result images with names and handicaps
mechanism.mechanism_villain_pairing: The mechanism (Tiger Experience) directly solves the villain's failure (traditional instruction that teaches one-size-fits-all swing). Where traditional instruction gives generic tips in short sessions, the Tiger Experience provides 48 hours of one-on-one total immersion with Tiger's actual coach. Where traditional instruction never identifies the root flaw, advanced tracking technology diagnoses it instantly. Where traditional methods fade after a few weeks, the Immersion Method installs the cure permanently. The Tiger brand association provides the ultimate credibility bridge.

I combined everything I learned from 6 years coaching Tiger, along with cutting edge technology, and the most secretive tactics and strategies from my 49 years of coaching experience.

proof_inventory.proof_sequence: The VSL opens with Hank's authority (Tiger's coach, 6 years), immediately delivers 5 testimonials with specific results (30 yards gained, 5 shots dropped, slice fixed, 8-9 shots improved, put on a clinic). The proof-first lead validates before explaining. Mid-body builds authority through the Tiger origin story (total immersion for 6 years, won 40% of tournaments). The mechanism section uses tracking technology and Immersion Method (Navy SEALs) as proof of sophistication. The 6-step breakdown itself serves as proof of thoroughness. Late-body stakes authority with 49 years + 157,000 golfers. Close circles back to transformation promises.

Life got in the way — waitlist, celebrity roster, family
Haven't slept well knowing this knowledge is out there but can't share it

key_characters: Johnny Golf, Russel Meyer, Terry Butler, Dennis Moreland, Rusty Weekes (testimonial proof)
story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: The most powerful method for transforming a golfer's game was developed during 6 years of exclusive coaching with Tiger Woods. This total immersion approach — combined with advanced technology and 49 years of coaching expertise — produces astonishing transformations in just 48 hours. Age is not a barrier (tested on golfers up to 83). The method has been locked away until now because Hank could never make it available at scale — until he invested hundreds of thousands to create the facility.
story_architecture.persuasion_function: Build authority through Hank's unreplicable Tiger Woods connection (6 years exclusive). Create desire through celebrity aspirational framing ('experience exactly what Tiger went through'). Prove concept through pilot testimonials (5 specific results). Justify exclusivity through facility investment and limited capacity. Drive urgency through scarcity (6 spots, 15,000 notified).
story_architecture.full_story_text: For 6 straight years, I had a front-row seat to the greatest player this game has ever seen: Tiger Woods... We'd dive deep into every part of his game. Just the two of us. No distractions. No other students. No time limits... This was total immersion. The kind of transformational coaching that typically costs hundreds of thousands of dollars... For 6 years, I refined this intense, immersive experience with Tiger… And developed an approach to golf transformation that's unlike anything else that exists... So when I stopped working with Tiger… my vision was to take what I learned from coaching the world's greatest player – and make this advanced knowledge available to recreational golfers like you. But sadly, that never happened... So not long ago, I had a crazy idea. I invested hundreds of thousands of dollars to create one of the most advanced golf instruction facilities in the world... Now, for the first time in human history, you can use the exact same method I discovered coaching Tiger… to level up YOUR game.
story_architecture.story_callbacks: Tiger Woods' name and 6-year connection referenced 20+ times. The 'total immersion' concept from the Tiger story is carried through into the Immersion Method explanation. The 'customized coaching' from Tiger is paralleled in the 'customized cure' for the participant. The 'game plans developed with Tiger' become the secretive cheatsheets. The '2-day deep dive' with Tiger directly parallels the '48-hour' Tiger Experience format.
story_architecture.emotional_peak: The moment Hank reveals his 'crazy idea' — investing hundreds of thousands to create the facility that makes the Tiger method available to recreational golfers for the first time in human history. This is the narrative climax where Hank's unfulfilled vision (locked-away method) meets entrepreneurial action.

section_sequence.purpose: Establish Hank Haney as Tiger Woods' coach and tease the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity
section_sequence.key_content: Hank introduces himself, references Tiger Woods, promises mind-blowing opportunity, establishes exclusivity (select few qualify).

section_sequence.purpose: Immediately validate with 5 specific results before explaining what the opportunity is
section_sequence.key_content: 5 testimonials: Johnny Golf (+30 yards, -5 shots), Russel Meyer (slice fixed), Terry Butler (ready to quit, reignited), Dennis Moreland (-8-9 shots), Rusty Weekes (clinic, +25-30 yards). All over 45, one was 83.

section_sequence.purpose: Establish why traditional instruction fails and introduce the solution frame
section_sequence.key_content: Getting better at golf is hard. Spent a fortune, no improvement. Instructors teach THEIR swing, not YOUR swing. Feel great in the moment, back to old habits on the course. Not your fault.

section_sequence.purpose: Transition from problem to the Tiger Experience solution
section_sequence.key_content: What I've created is an experience — identify the ONE hidden flaw, permanently eliminate it, 5-10 strokes off in 48 hours. A swing built specifically for YOU. Never need another lesson again.

section_sequence.purpose: Build Hank's personal authority through the 6-year Tiger coaching narrative and explain why this hasn't been available before
section_sequence.key_content: 6 years exclusively coaching Tiger. Total immersion — 2 days at a time, just the two of them. Tiger won 40% of tournaments. Developed unique approach. Remained exclusive (Tiger, O'Meara, celebrities). Vision to share with amateurs. Life happened. Crazy idea: invested hundreds of thousands to create Chicago facility.

section_sequence.purpose: Address key objections and establish format (in-person, one-on-one with Hank, limited spots)
section_sequence.key_content: 1) Travel to Chicago studio, one-on-one with Hank personally (same as Tiger, O'Meara). 2) Not traditional lessons — identifies root flaw, creates custom cure, fixes 3+ other flaws. 3) Only 6 spots, 15,000 notified, first launch.

section_sequence.purpose: Detail the complete 6-step transformation — the core mechanism and offer
section_sequence.key_content: Step 1: Root flaw diagnosis (tracking technology). Step 2: Immersion Method installation (3D motion recording). Step 3: Tour-level ball flight training. Step 4: 9-hole SIM + Tiger's mindset techniques. Step 5: Secretive game plan cheatsheets. Step 6: 12 months unlimited coaching.

section_sequence.purpose: Establish qualification criteria and drive to phone call booking
section_sequence.key_content: Requirement 1: Full commitment (reputation on the line). Requirement 2: Secrecy (don't teach these strategies). Requirement 3: Full weekend dedicated. Book a 10-minute qualification call. Not a sales call. 6 spots, 15,000 notified, 48 hours max.

section_sequence.purpose: Recap everything, acknowledge the challenge, create final urgency push
section_sequence.key_content: Recap: tracking technology, Immersion Method, mental tactics, cheatsheets, 12 months coaching. Will be challenging. Works for golfers in their 80s. Only 6 spots. This is your big break. Once-in-a-lifetime. Click Book A Call.

transition_techniques: 'So, here's the deal. A few months back...' (transitions from announcement to testimonials)
'Now, before I tell you more about this opportunity, let's talk about what this ISN'T.' (transitions from testimonials to problem section)
'But I'm here to tell you that's not true.' (transitions from pain to promise)
'Let me tell you how this all started.' (transitions to Tiger origin story)
'So not long ago, I had a crazy idea.' (transitions from struggle to discovery)
'Now before I go any further, there are three important things you need to know:' (transitions to criteria)
'Now should you qualify to come through this transformation, these are the six astonishing lengths I'll go through...' (transitions to 6-step breakdown)
'If you can agree to those three criteria...' (transitions to CTA)
narrative_flow.pacing_notes: Opens with celebrity authority (Hank + Tiger) creating immediate awe. Delivers 5 testimonials as proof-first anchor. Slows for problem education and root cause. Builds through the Tiger origin story — the emotional center of the piece (6 years with Tiger, total immersion, locked-away method). Sustains momentum through detailed 6-step breakdown (each step building excitement). 3 requirements add gravitas and scarcity. Close maintains urgency with repeated CTA and scarcity.
repetition_patterns: never need another traditional lesson, video tutorial (repeated 4+ times)
one-on-one / just the two of us (repeated 5+ times)
callbacks: Tiger Woods' name and 6-year connection — established in lead, detailed in origin story, referenced throughout 6-step breakdown and close
Total immersion — introduced in Tiger story, named as Immersion Method in Step 2, referenced in close recap
Customized coaching — paralleled from Tiger's experience to the participant's experience throughout
Game plans with Tiger — introduced in origin story, detailed in Step 5
Never need another lesson — promised early, reinforced in Step 1, restated in close

offer.main_product: The Tiger Experience — 48-Hour In-Person Transformation at Hank Haney's Chicago Studio

value_stack_sequence.item_description: Slow motion cameras and tens of thousands of dollars of tracking technology track every millisecond of movement in every joint, muscle, and ligament. Identifies the exact root flaw with pinpoint accuracy and creates your customized cure.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Implied extremely high (only creme de la creme of Pros have access)

value_stack_sequence.item: One-on-One Immersion Method Installation with Hank Haney
value_stack_sequence.item_description: Personal coaching with Hank using the Immersion Method (same approach used with Tiger) combined with advanced 3D motion recording technology. Installs custom cure into your DNA.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Implied hundreds of thousands (the kind of coaching that typically costs hundreds of thousands)

value_stack_sequence.item_description: Train to hit high draws, bullet fades, and everything in between — on command. Proves transformation is real and builds rock-solid confidence. 99% of amateurs cannot do this.
Play 9 holes on SIM with Hank. Identify every real-time scenario where mistakes happen. Apply new swing. Learn Tiger's personal mindset: slow heart rate, visualize shots, calm nerves.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Not separately stated (Tiger's mindset techniques = priceless framing)

value_stack_sequence.item: Secretive Game Plan Cheatsheets and Blueprints
value_stack_sequence.item_description: Series of game plans developed over years with Tiger. How to play any course, best clubs, when to attack or play safe, pressure holes. Not yardage books — highly secretive game plans only insiders know exist.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Not separately stated (positioned as insider secrets from Tiger era)

value_stack_sequence.item_description: Continued coaching with elite instructor on Hank's team. Send video of any problem, get exact solution. 12 full months of unlimited access.
value_stack_sequence.value_stated: Not separately stated but positioned as unprecedented for recreational golfers

offer.total_stated_value: Not explicitly totaled. Price deliberately withheld — phone-close funnel. Implied value anchored to 'hundreds of thousands of dollars' (what total immersion coaching typically costs).

price_psychology.anchor_price: Hundreds of thousands of dollars (what total immersion coaching typically costs)
price_psychology.actual_price: Not stated — phone close. 'I'm NOT going to give you a link to an order form or tell you how much it costs.'
price_psychology.price_justification: This is the same coaching that creates the greatest players — typically costs hundreds of thousands. Hank invested hundreds of thousands to build the facility. Only 6 spots available. First launch of The Tiger Experience.
comparison_anchors: Hundreds of thousands of dollars for total immersion coaching
Hundreds of thousands invested by Hank to create facility
Tens of thousands of dollars of tracking technology

urgency_scarcity.language: I can only allow 6 golfers in on this. And you're one of about 15,000 players I'm sending this video to today. So if you leave this page, and return later, you'll likely miss out. I expect all 6 spots to fill fast – probably by the end of today. First come, first served.
urgency_scarcity.scarcity_proof: Only 6 spots. 15,000 golfers notified. First-come-first-served. First Tiger Experience launch. Hank's personal involvement limits capacity.

guarantee.language: No explicit money-back guarantee stated. Guarantee is implicit in the qualification process — 'We need to speak with you and find out if you're a fit for what I'm trying to accomplish here.' The framing is that Hank must qualify YOU, not that you're buying something.
guarantee.conditions: Must pass 3 requirements: full commitment, secrecy agreement, dedicate a full weekend. Qualification call determines fit.

offer.unique_mechanism_claim: A world's first. Nobody has ever been in the position to share these top secret tactics, methods, and technology with recreational golfers before — because no one else on the planet has worked with Tiger Woods for 6 straight years during one of the most dominant stretches in the history of golf AND spent over 49 years transforming 157,000+ golfers.

close.cta_text: Click the 'Book A Call' link below this video

sequence.text: Three requirements: 1) Full commitment (no late nights, heavy drinking, hungover — too much on the line). 2) Secrecy (don't teach these strategies to another soul on earth — took a LOT of investment to develop). 3) Dedicate a full weekend.
Schedule a short 10-minute call with my assistant. Click the 'Book A Call' link below this video. Not an aggressive sales call — a pleasant 10-minute conversation to find out if you qualify.
Over 15,000 golfers have been notified about this video today. I'm 100% certain all 6 spots will be GONE in 48-hours MAX. First come, first served.
Advanced swing analysis technology. Immersion Method. Elite-level mental tactics from Tiger. Secretive cheatsheets and game-plan blueprints. 12 months unlimited video coaching.

This 48-hour transformation will be challenging. It won't be easy at times. You'll be taken outside your comfort zone often. But what you'll get in return are skills that will make you a better golfer than any other amateur you'll ever play with. Already worked for golfers in their 80s.

Will YOU be one of those golfers? Or will you still be struggling this time again next year? This is your big break. It's the fastest path to unleashing your full golfing potential. And it's a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity that you may never get again.

Click the 'Book A Call' link below this video right now. I'm Hank Haney. Thanks for watching. And if you're one of the 6 lucky people who come onboard for this, then get ready for the opportunity of a lifetime.

close.future_pacing_text: You will NOT be the same golfer when this weekend is over. Believe me, your technique and golf IQ will be on a whole other level. Soon, you'll be playing better than you ever played in your entire life.
close.final_objection_handling: Addresses 'is this a sales call?' with 'This call will not be an aggressive sales call. Instead, it will be a pleasant, 10-minute phone call, to find out if you qualify. If you do, we'll give you all the details — including the investment to get started.' Addresses 'can I really do this?' with 'it's already worked for golfers in their 80s who were not physically fit.'
close.final_push: This is your big break. It's the fastest path to unleashing your full golfing potential. And it's a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity that you may never get again.
close.risk_reversal_restatement: Risk is managed through qualification framing. The prospect doesn't 'buy' — they 'qualify' for an opportunity. The 10-minute call is low-commitment. Tone is 'we might not accept you' rather than 'please buy this.'

metadata.original_source: Performance Golf / Caleb O'Dowd HTKT VSL (Hank Haney Tiger Experience variant)
metadata.raw_swipe_file: HTKT - Hank Haney Tiger Experience VSL (V2) (1).md
metadata.central_concept: Traditional golf instruction fails because instructors teach their own swing — a generic approach never customized for YOUR body, age, limitations, or habits. The transformational coaching method that created Tiger Woods — total immersion, advanced technology, one-on-one with Tiger's actual coach — has been locked away for decades. For the first time, Hank Haney is making this exact method available to recreational golfers over 45 at his Chicago studio. The Tiger Experience is a 48-hour, 6-step in-person transformation that identifies the ONE hidden root swing flaw, permanently eliminates it, installs tour-level skills, and drops 5-10 strokes from your handicap. Only 6 spots available. Phone qualification required.
metadata.extractor_notes: High-ticket backend VSL written by Caleb O'Dowd (high-ticket copy specialist). This is the Hank Haney variant of the Performance Golf HTKT template. Key differentiator from the Brixton Albert archetype VSL: Hank Haney IS the mechanism — his personal 6-year relationship with Tiger Woods is the unreplicable credential. Where the Brixton version uses Performance Golf's institutional authority and elite academy framing, the Hank version uses celebrity coach authority and the Tiger aspirational frame. The Tiger name appears 20+ times — the entire VSL is anchored to the idea of experiencing 'exactly what Tiger went through.' Same HTKT structural DNA as all 3 variants: 6-step transformation, Immersion Method, motion capture/tracking technology, 12 months coaching, 3 requirements, Book A Call close, testimonial-first lead, origin story. The Hank variant adds: tour-level ball flight training, 9-hole SIM session, Tiger's mindset techniques, and cheatsheets 'developed with Tiger.' The origin story shifts from Brixton's 'couldn't afford academy' to Hank's 'stopped coaching Tiger, invested to create facility.' Phone-close funnel: no price stated, no order form, drives to 'Book A Call' qualification call.

template_elements: Origin story of bringing elite methods to everyday golfers
Root swing flaw diagnosis as Step 1
variant_differentiators: Presenter IS the mechanism (Hank Haney personally coaches, not academy instructors)
Tiger Woods celebrity association drives the entire narrative (20+ mentions)
Tour-level ball flight training (unique to this variant)
9-hole SIM session with Hank (unique to this variant)
Tiger's personal mindset techniques (unique to this variant)
Cheatsheets framed as 'developed with Tiger over 6 years'
Origin story = personal coaching career + Tiger + unfulfilled vision
Age range proof: 45-83 (vs. 45-83 for Brixton, 55+ for Martin)

fssit_candidates.statement: Most golf instructors simply don't have the high-level experience to be able to teach all levels of the game. That's why they teach you THEIR swing. Not a swing that fits YOUR body, YOUR age, YOUR limitations, or YOUR habits.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why every lesson, tutorial, and tip has failed: the instruction was never a custom solution built for YOUR specific swing flaw by someone with high-level experience. Not your fault — wrong instructor, not wrong effort.

fssit_candidates.statement: For 6 years, I refined this intense, immersive experience with Tiger… And developed an approach to golf transformation that's unlike anything else that exists. But it's been highly exclusive. Outside of Tiger, Mark O'Meara, and a very select group of celebrities and private students, no one else has experienced this immersive coaching system.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Reveals the transformational method has always existed — it's what created Tiger Woods — but has been structurally inaccessible. Only Tiger, O'Meara, and select celebrities experienced it. You were locked out of the method that actually works.

fssit_candidates.statement: Now, for the first time in human history, you can use the exact same method I discovered coaching Tiger… to level up YOUR game.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Creates the 'this changes everything' moment — the barrier that kept you from Tiger-level coaching has been broken for the first time ever.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Distributed through mid-body with peak at the 'crazy idea' facility reveal

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Audience expects golf improvement to come from more lessons, more practice, better equipment, or the latest tip/drill. This violates that by revealing that a single 48-hour immersive weekend with Tiger Woods' actual personal coach, using the exact methods that created the greatest golfer in history, can permanently transform your game — making all traditional lessons obsolete.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Unique positioning: Personal coaching with Tiger Woods' actual coach, using Tiger's exact methods, at Hank's personal facility. No competitor can occupy this position because the Tiger-Haney relationship is historically unique and unreplicable.

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: Removes self-blame by revealing: It's not your fault. Most golf instructors simply don't have the high-level experience to teach all levels of the game. They teach THEIR swing, not YOUR swing. The method that actually transforms golfers — total immersion with a coach of Hank's caliber — has been locked away with Tiger, O'Meara, and celebrities. You never had access to the method that works.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: years of lessons/practice/investment + no lasting improvement → explained by instruction system being fundamentally limited (instructors lack Tiger-level experience, method locked away). Creates coherent narrative: you weren't failing, you were using the wrong method with the wrong coaches.
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Someone who now has access to the EXACT method that created Tiger Woods — personal coaching with Tiger's actual coach, at his facility, using his methods. You're one of only 6 people who get to experience this for the first time in human history.

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: 2020+ era — references modern tracking technology, Performance Golf as established brand, Hank's post-retirement from tour coaching phase
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Quantity scarcity (6 spots, 15K notified) + first-launch urgency (first Tiger Experience ever) + personal capacity limitation (Hank personally coaches, can't scale)
evergreen_elements: Tiger Woods' legacy as greatest golfer — permanently embedded in golf culture
Root cause reframe about instruction quality — perpetually valid
Desire for golf improvement among aging recreational golfers — persistent market
Celebrity coach access as aspirational frame — always compelling
Total immersion coaching as differentiated format — structurally unique
